description.value:
Wondrous Item, Rare

Tiny silver fishhook with gold feather. Tie to fishing line in 10-ft-cube water. After each uninterrupted hour, roll d6 — on 6, a magical fish appears. Roll d20: 1-10 green (nourishes 1 creature, spoils in 24h); 11-14 yellow (throwable knockdown, DC 15 Str); 15-18 blue (flying singing fish, 2d4h); 19-20 gold (nourishes + 2d10 temp hp). Resets at dawn.
